asset.title: L1 Read
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clean, highly legible workflow preview demonstrating an AI agent performing a basic read operation on financial variance data. The step-by-step progress is clearly indicated at the bottom.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly highlights the row being read and updates the status bar to reflect the AI's current action.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, the active reading step, and the final completion state with step counters.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with consistent typography, clear row highlighting, and balanced spacing.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the financial spreadsheet context and agent execution tracing of the platform.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live execution trace, showing authentic step-by-step agent behavior.

legibility.evidence: High-contrast text and clean layout make all labels and status messages easily readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates basic data extraction from financial tables, relevant for automated auditing workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents a simple read-only task without exaggerating agent capabilities.

observedEvidence: Table showing financial metrics (Revenue, COGS, Gross profit, Net income)
AI goal and step progress indicator at the bottom
Visual highlight on the 'Net income / variance' row during the read action
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: AI agent executing a simple L1 Read operation on financial variance data without altering any values.
